description_long: This is a compact, modern security camera with a circular, black lens module set within a white, disc-shaped housing. The camera is mounted on a short, cylindrical stem that connects to a wide, flat, round base, providing stability for placement on flat surfaces. The front face features a prominent lens at the center, surrounded by a glossy black ring, likely containing sensors or indicator lights. The body and base are made of smooth, matte white plastic, giving it a clean and minimalistic appearance. The overall design is streamlined, with no visible buttons or ports, suggesting a focus on aesthetics and ease of use. The camera's form factor and base indicate it is intended for surface mounting, such as on a desk, shelf, or countertop.
description: A sleek, circular security camera with a black lens set in a white, disc-shaped housing on a sturdy round base. The design is minimalistic and modern, suitable for surface placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black lens and glossy ring centered in the white circular housing, with the base fully visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the dome-like profile of the camera housing and the cylindrical stem connecting to the round base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, featureless back of the camera housing and the supporting stem and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the rounded housing and stem from the other side.
